text: Captain Barnaby has {0} coins. He gives {1} to Polly. Then he finds {2} more on the beach. How many coins now?
There are {0} astronauts. {1} float out. Then {2} aliens hop inside. How many friends inside now?
A baker makes {0} cupcakes. A hungry giant eats {1}. The baker bakes {2} more. How many ready to sell?
{0} bees are sleeping. {1} fly out. Later, {2} fly back. How many bees in the hive now?
There are {0} toys. You take out {1}. You put {2} back because they are sleepy. How many toys are still out?
{0} T-Rexes are dancing. {1} go home. Then {2} Triceratops arrive. How many dinosaurs now?
{0} fish are swimming. {1} hide. Then {2} more swim out. How many fish can you see swimming now?
{0} people are on a bus. {1} get off. At the next stop, {2} get on. How many people now?

sets.text: A basket has {0} apples and {1} oranges. You eat {2} apples. Then you add {3} more oranges. How many fruit total?
Nutty the Squirrel has {0} nuts. He hides {1} in a tree and {2} in a hole. A bird gives him {3} more. How many nuts now?
You have {0} lego bricks. You use {1} for a car and {2} for a plane. Then you find {3} more. How many bricks now?
A tree has {0} birds. {1} fly away. {2} more land. Then {3} more fly away. How many birds now?
A pirate finds {0} gems. He loses {1} in the sand. He finds {2} more. Then he gives {3} to a monkey. How many now?
You have {0} markers. {1} dry up. You buy a pack of {2}. Then you give {3} to a friend. How many markers now?
There are {0} frogs on a log. {1} jump off. {2} more jump on. Then {3} more jump off. How many frogs on the log?
You have {0} sweets. You give {1} to your sister and {2} to your brother. Your mum gives you {3} more. Then you eat {4}. How many left?
A shelf has {0} books. You take {1} out. Your friend puts {2} back. A teacher takes {3} books. Then you find {4} more. How many now?
There are {0} red flowers and {1} blue flowers. Wind blows away {2} red. You plant {3} yellow. Then {4} blue wilt. How many now?
15 balloons are at a party. {1} balloons pop! You blow up {2} more. {3} balloons fly out. A friend brings {4} more. How many now?
A farm has {0} animals. {1} cows go to the barn. {2} pigs go to the field. {3} sheep arrive. {4} cow comes back. How many now?
There are {0} kids at a park. {1} go home. {2} more arrive. {3} go to the slides. Then {4} leave. How many kids left?
A shop has {0} robot toys. It sells {1}. It gets {2} more in a box. {3} are broken and taken away. Then {4} more are sold. How many now?
A castle has {0} knights. {1} go on a quest. {2} new knights arrive. {3} go to sleep. Then {4} come back from the quest. How many ready?
